description: A designed square 'THE WORST FIRST' arrest card in the standard ICE template. Background is the recurring high-contrast black-and-white close-up of open hands in metal handcuffs, dark gradient on the left. Top-left light-cyan small-caps serif headline 'ARRESTED AND PENDING REMOVAL' with white subline '2/15/2025 | St. Paul, MN'. Red diagonal corner banner top-right reads 'ST. PAUL'. Large bold white name at mid-left: 'Oscar Ocampo-Molina'. Bold white 'CRIME:' label with bullet 'Sexual misconduct against a victim under 14'. Bottom-left round DHS seal and white 'ICE' wordmark; bottom-right red box '-THE- WORST FIRST'. A generic handcuffed-hands stock photo stands in for a mugshot. Propaganda technique: an inflammatory child-victim sex offense charge attached to a named individual plus a city tag, designed to maximize public outrage and legitimize aggressive deportation. Target audience: general public and regional media.
notable_text: ARRESTED AND PENDING REMOVAL; 2/15/2025 | St. Paul, MN; Oscar Ocampo-Molina; CRIME: Sexual misconduct against a victim under 14; ST. PAUL; -THE- WORST FIRST; ICE
